question: What is the scope of API 5CT?

chunks.content: 1 Casing and Tubing 1 Scope 1.1 Coverage This standard specifies the technical delivery conditions for steel pipes (casing, tubing, and pup joints)...
162 API S PECIFICATION 5CT Stencil Marking [beginning at least 0.6 m (2 ft) from either externally threaded end] Stamp Marking—Optional [within app...

response_preview: **Answer:** The scope of API 5CT includes the technical delivery conditions for steel pipes (casing, tubing, and pup joints), couplings, coupling stock, coupling material, and accessory material [1].
